name: Beer Sourdough Starter
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the beer and flour well.
2. Place the mixture on a counter and let it sit for 5-10 days.
3. Stir the mixture 3 times per day.
4. When the starter separates into a creamy thick bottom and thin liquid top, it is ready to use in any sourdough recipe.
5. A good sour bread recipe can be used if needed (it's great for tang!).
